{{CargoRelic
|name=Dimensional Wanted Order S-1
|class_id=20862
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The Demon God's apostles occupy space-time gaps, Earth's will issues this wanted order to encourage travelers to go all out to eliminate the apostles! -- Earth's Will (Seal)
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=16
|civ=17
|tech=28
|ss1=Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +1<br>Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail HP +10<br>Apostles Defeated: 40/40
|ss2=Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +2<br>Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail HP +20<br>Apostles Defeated: 40/40
|ss3=Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Apostles Defeated: 40/40
|ss4=Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Apostles Defeated: 40/40
|ss7=Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Rift Apostle defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Apostles Defeated: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
